name: Easy Basic Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2/3 cup half & half, plain yogurt, and 1/3 cup milk
1 cup Jack cheese, grated or a combination of cheeses
1 package frozen spinach (or lightly cooked broccoli and shrimp)
recipeInstructions:
1. Whip the eggs until fluffy and add the milk. Stir together and add the filling mixture.
2. Sprinkle the cheese over the bottom of the pie crust and fill with the egg-milk mixture.
3. Bake at 375°F for 35 to 40 minutes, or until the top is golden brown. Allow it to cool slightly before cutting.
Note: Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" by Judy R.
